_meta.description: Single source of truth for the BrawlMeta Intelligence Engine. Encodes Bobby's draft framework ('The Best Draft Guide EVER' parts 1+2): the 7 draft classes, the counter triangle (Control > Anti-Tank > Tank/Aggro > Control), active vs passive mode tempo, thrower rules, space-maker timing, and 1-mid + 2-lane team structure. Read by src/data/draftEngine.js (browser) AND scrapers/meta_weights.py (daily intelligence refresh) — edit here, both sides follow.

rankedIneligible._comment: Manually maintained hard-exclusion list — brawlers newly released but not yet legal in competitive Ranked. Belt-and-suspenders on top of the scraper's ranked-only filter (scrapers/common.py): if a brawler's data ever leaks in anyway (mistagged battle type, a spidered match from before their ranked debut), this keeps them out of suggestions and the blind-pick list regardless. getDraftAdvice excludes every key listed here from its candidate pool entirely. Remove a brawler from this list the patch they go live in Ranked.

brawlerClassOverrides._comment: Owner-confirmed draft class for every brawler, transcribed from Bobby's role map (screenshot 2026-07-17). Always wins over apiClassToDraftClass — draftClassOf() checks this first regardless of the brawler's official Supercell class, so it's the single source of truth for the draft engine's class assignment, not just a patch for Unknown-class new releases.

abilityLabels._comment: Ability tags from the same role map — a static per-brawler trait shown as a badge on suggestion cards, distinct from data-driven flags like Meta Breaker.

counterMatrix._comment: counterMatrix[A][B] > 0 means class A counters class B (score -2..+2). Encodes Bobby's triangle: Anti-Tank beats Tank, Tank/Aggro beats Control, Control beats Anti-Tank — 'everything in the game gets countered by something'. Space makers dive backline (snipers/throwers/support) but die to anti-tank damage and control.

synergyPairs._comment: Same-team class pairings that amplify each other. Applied once per pair present in a comp.

roles._comment: Standard ranked structure: one mid (objective player) + two laners. Lane anchors can hold a lane 1v1; objective specialists carry the mode's win condition.

modes._comment: Bobby's two metas: active/aggro (Brawl Ball, Gem Grab, Hot Zone, Heist) vs passive (Bounty, Knockout). classWeights scale a brawler's score on that mode; maxPerClass enforces e.g. 'in Brawl Ball limit control to one brawler maximum'. damageOverMatchup relaxes matchup penalties where raw output wins ('I'd much rather have bad matchups with good damage' — Heist).

statisticalCoefficients._comment: Applied by meta_weights.py when building brawler_intelligence, and by the engine as score multipliers. true_win_rate = Bayesian shrink of raw WR toward 50% with confidencePriorGames of prior weight, so tiny samples can't fake a 60% brawler.

throwerPenalty._comment: Bobby: 'never pick a thrower unless it's last pick or you have protection for it'. Flat penalty on global pick slots 1-4, waived if the team already fields a protection class, halved in passive-tempo modes where throwers are structurally strong.

classDiversity._comment: Bobby: 'if you pick three control brawlers, all of your brawlers are countered by one aggro'. Multiplier per duplicate class already on the team (compounds: 0.7, then 0.49).

antiTankFirstPick._comment: Bobby: 'anti-tank is the foundation of every draft'; best anti-tank is almost always the correct first pick in objective (active) modes.

spaceMakerLateBonus._comment: Space makers are the skill separator — strongest in slots 4-6 when the enemy comp is revealed and can't answer the dive.

counterStack._comment: Bobby: 'if the enemy commits to a class, the hard counter to it is almost a free pick'. When the enemy fields 2+ of one class, a brawler whose class hard-counters it (counterMatrix >= hardCounterThreshold) gets a flat bonus PER stacked enemy — applied AFTER mode weighting so a favorable enemy mode can't bury the counter (e.g. two snipers on a Bounty map still make Mortis/Kit a lock).

abilityRules._comment: Ability-tag synergy/counter rules (Bobby): wall break opens lanes for snipers, strips the cover throwers depend on, and forces anti-tanks into the open where snipers kite them. Applied on top of the class counter matrix; bonuses are on the same ~50-point score scale as the other constraints.

supportRules._comment: Bobby: supports are reactive 'conditional modifiers'. Never draft one in the first two global picks unless it's a meta-anchor on this map (waiver: map true WR >= waiverMinMapTrueWR); never without a lane/aggro partner to support. Named combos reward the known pairings late-draft.

counterLadder._comment: Phase-specific drafting: picks 1-2 are the anchor phase (stats-led, counters barely matter — the enemy hasn't committed), 3-4 target revealed picks, 5-6 are hard-counter execution. counterWeightBySlot scales BOTH the class-matrix and empirical vs-class edges. Preventative blocking (PASS 3) is naturally off at slot 6 since the enemy comp is complete. lastPickSpecialist: a brawler with a thin map sample is a niche/last-pick option, demoted during slots 1-4. throwerLastPick: at slots 5-6 a thrower gets a bonus when the enemy fielded no wall break to strip its cover.

winProbability._comment: Draft-complete win split. Logistic squash of the comp-score differential; capped 85/15 because no draft is ever truly 90-10 — execution still exists.
